signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit provides regulatory clarity, removing a major overhang on XRP and driving a 10% price surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance. This fundamental resolution shifts market sentiment toward institutional adoption. [1]
